all of those choices are meta chars but you need more than E0 to be considered good. like kathi, doresain, pollux or the worst Gdoll who needs +4 (E1 she still works but not as strong like other support unit) to be able to pair with meta comp. maybe from your condition you want Corpo and gacha her again to E2 then focus on other awakeners like gmurphy 

But you have other choice castor and clem it's a unit that can still work in E0 but you doesn't seem to invest in ultra so it's best not to.. OR take Gdoll and build her slowly in a long term investment...

OR AGAIN you can build kath to E3 because she is a strong awakener in the late game... but during E1 and E2 she has a little problem with her fiamma stack... (corpo also strong btw but she need discard awaker like aurita)

Oh little note.. E0 tawil it's a bit expensive about arith.. if you have the intention of making a team from tawil it's best if you make her E1 first

Up to you. Tawil breakpoints are E1/E2/OE.
Castor breakpoints are E0/E3/OE. Other options exist but who do you have interest in?
im sorry, but what is OE? is not the same EO?
OE short for “OverExalt” is an upgraded Exalt that costs 200 Aliemus to use. It is unlocked when a character reaches E3 +4, a total of 8 copies(including base copy).

Well, the original question is “Who should I get(other options)?” I am a information source that will tell you anything and everything.
It’s more-so who do you want? I’ll tell you how much Dupes they need for XYZ reasons and teams for them. Viability and Usage.
Jenkins wants E1, and Castor can be E0(Shield+Support)/E3(Shield+Support+DPS)/OE(God).

how do you actually play castor, should I be saving for OE or using exalt to get as many plumes in my hand

Tawil’s most accessible and best team as a beginner is Aequor Tawil. Consisting of Caecus/Celeste, one or the other, or both. Tawil desires E1 to be “playable” and E2 is perfect. OE is her true power, but that’s alot of dupes.

Adapt to the situation, if you need to Exalt, then Exalt to survive. OE if you can get that much Aliemus without dying. Castor at OE can solo DPS, and his gameplay is all about stacking as many “Onyx Plumes” in hand before Bursting with all Plumes. If you are mixing with Aequor, you will want to “Red Stance” first. E2 on Castor makes it so when you play “Stygian Wings”(2 cost) you gain 5 Aliemus per “Onyx Plume” in hand. E3 makes every 3 Onyx Plumes grant 1 Arithma and 10% Final Dmg to Castor for the fight. Rouse is Key before bursting as it gives you 100% CR and allows stacking of “Corrosion”.
ah rousing before bursting I'll remember that
but jenkin is on his team to proc the corrosion that he stacks?
Yes, but OE Castor does so much damage on his own, and Jenkin is extra reassurance to proc Corrosion.

somethuing pretty

Corpo 4 cost on Discard from her Own Exalt reduces cost by 1, and it has Retain and Prepare which means keeping it in hand reduces cost by 1, eventually 1 or 0 cost. 

Fauxborn Exalt makes it so all damage dealt to the enemy stacks “Sacrifice” on them, and her 3 cost in “Red Stance” strikes the enemy 5 times(The 3 cost has Retain so it can be held in hand). 

Tawil makes “Wings” using “Pinions”, and Wings are Tawil’s main damage with “Twin Wings” being 2 attacks, “Four” 4 attacks, and “Six” 6 attacks. Her Exalt makes the next card played TWICE.

Hameln Exalt makes a Base Command Card played Twice(only one time per fight). His Rouse gives you a 0 cost card every turn that allows you to choose between, “The next card costs 2x but played 2 times”, or “The next card is 2 less Arithma”.

Before you burst, you want to “Red Stance” due to each INSTANCE of Dmg proccing a Extra Tentacle Hit.

in account 3, your only unit worth mentioning is miryam, who is quite good, but that's all you have really
